description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the gradle:4.4.1-jdk8-alpine Docker image. Define two stages: build and test, set the GRADLE_OPTS variable to -Dorg.gradle.daemon=false, and export GRADLE_USER_HOME to the .gradle directory in before_script. In the build stage add a build job that caches the paths lab_*/build and .gradle with a key of $CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME and a push policy, then runs the command gradle --build-cache assemble. In the test stage add a test job that pulls the same cache, caches the same paths, runs gradle check, and publishes artifacts from lab_*/build/reports with a name ${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}-TestReports that expire in 2 weeks.
